title: Companion — The Compression Ladder (audio)
medium: Web Audio piece — a six-rung sonic descent matching the architectural one. six voices play together at first (stone pad, vault drone, crowd noise, speech formant, chime, rhythmic tick). every 7.5 seconds one voice is subtracted. at the end there is silence.
caption: The arcade gives up its mass voice by voice. Stone, vault, crowd, speech, chime, tick — each one a piece of what the enclosure used to do. The convention outlives every one of them.
